error_signature: modal opens automatically on page load
title: Modal opens automatically instead of on button click
symptom: The modal appears open when the page loads instead of waiting for a button click. This is not the intended behavior.
applies_when: Modal is configured to open on page load
User expects modal to open only on button click
not_this_if: Modal is correctly configured to open only on button click
root_cause: The modal's configuration may have the 'open in editor' setting enabled, which causes it to display immediately when the page loads instead of being triggered by user interaction.
fix_steps: Access the modal settings in the editor
Turn off the 'open in editor' option
Save the changes and refresh the page
agent_instruction: Disable the 'open in editor' setting for the modal in the configuration.
